description: Private single-user Telegram bot with local LLM (Ollama), vault I/O, semantic search via ChromaDB, and tool-calling loop. All data stays on local infrastructure.

main.py.description: Loads .env, calls bot.build_app(), starts Telegram polling loop.

bot.py.description: All Telegram command and message handlers. Single authorized user gate. Bridges async Telegram events to synchronous LLM calls via asyncio.to_thread().

handlers.cmd_vault: /vault — summarizes last 10 history messages, writes markdown note to vault, syncs git
handlers.cmd_whisper: /whisper — picks random vault chunk, generates English tweet via LLM
handlers.handle_photo: PHOTO messages — downloads largest photo size as bytearray, base64-encodes, calls llm.run_with_image(caption, image_b64)

patterns: keep_typing() coroutine sends chat action every 4s during LLM wait
Photo response edits the 'Processing image...' status message in-place

llm.py.description: Ollama API client. Three entry points: run() for text, run_with_image() for vision, summarize_to_vault() for structured JSON output, whisper_tweet() for tweet generation. run() and run_with_image() both execute the tool call loop.

functions._chat: POST /v1/chat/completions with TOOL_DEFINITIONS; returns raw API response dict
functions.run: Main text loop. Adds user message to context, builds messages [system + history], calls _chat(), handles tool_calls up to 5 iterations.
functions.run_with_image: Vision loop. Filters tool/tool_calls messages from history (Ollama limitation), prepends image_url content block, then runs same tool call loop as run().
functions.summarize_to_vault: One-shot LLM call without tools. Returns parsed {titel, samenvatting} JSON dict.
functions.whisper_tweet: One-shot LLM call without tools. Returns tweet string.

flow: if finish_reason == tool_calls: execute each tool via TOOL_HANDLERS, store results in context, append to messages, continue
if finish_reason == stop: store assistant text in context, return

context.py.description: In-memory conversation history using a deque with maxlen=20. Stores user, assistant, tool_calls, and tool result messages. Oldest message discarded when full.

vector.py.description: ChromaDB persistent vector store for vault content. Ollama embedding client. Handles chunking, indexing, semantic search, and random chunk retrieval.

functions._embed: POST to Ollama /api/embeddings; returns vector list
functions._chunk: Sliding window chunker. Returns list of {id: 'file::N', text, metadata: {file_name, chunk}}
functions.index_file: Delete existing chunks for file, rechunk content, embed each chunk, add to ChromaDB
functions.random_chunk: Get total count, pick random offset, return single document string or None
functions.search_vault_semantic:
Embed query, query collection n_results=5, format as '[file_name]
{doc}' joined by '---'

tools.py.description: Vault file I/O, git sync, website analysis. Defines TOOL_DEFINITIONS (OpenAI-format schemas) and TOOL_HANDLERS (name → callable). Imported by llm.py.

read_vault.returns: file content string or error string

sync_vault.command: git add . && git commit -m 'Sovereign-Link Update' && git push

search_vault_semantic.returns: top 5 formatted chunks with file metadata

analyze_website.returns: extracted markdown content (max 8000 chars) or error string

ingest.py.description: One-time bulk indexing. Scans VAULT_PATH recursively for *.md files, calls vector.index_file() for each. Run once at setup or after bulk vault changes.

SYSTEM_PROMPT.description: Custom LLM system instruction. Default instructs vault assistant behavior + analyze_website usage.

security.authorization: ALLOWED_USER_ID check on every Telegram handler
security.path_traversal: os.path.realpath check before any vault file access
security.tool_loop_limit: Max 5 iterations in tool call loop to prevent infinite loops
security.vision_history_filter: Tool/tool_calls messages stripped from history before vision requests
